title: Sul-34
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sul-34''' was a [[Navigation buoy/Legends|Navigation Buoy]] that served as a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperjump point]].

==History==
It was used by several [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] on their way to rendezvous with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] in preparation for the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] sent [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] to lead a group of [[Missile Boat]]s, along with [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboat]] escorts, in an ambush to destroy the first three Rebel capital ships to arrive, weakening their forces and delaying their assault while they waited for reinforcements.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
